items.title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck on AI IPOs, personal agents, and the ROI reckoning
items.summary: Tokenmaxxing was the hottest trend in Silicon Valley earlier this year, with CEOs encouraging employees to push AI usage as far as it would go. Then the bill came due. Uber reportedly blew through its annual AI budget in a few months, some companies cut Claude licenses for parts of their org, and Meta killed its internal leaderboard. This tension between […]

items.summary: MENLO PARK, CA, Clario, the first platform built to eliminate enterprise data ROT, launched from stealth with $6 million in seed funding.
